generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, you know how important it is to keep our communities safe. Recent events show that expanding domestic security powers isn't about restricting freedoms - it's about giving our law enforcement the tools they need to prevent tragedies. Just look at how effective targeted surveillance has been in stopping potential threats before they happen. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
